title: Evangelion Piko Piko Junior High School Student Legend

wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Piko Piko Junior High School Student Legend             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 05, 2015 1:41 pm Piko Piko = Video game sound effects. Thought we had a topic about this manga already, but I guess not. Apparently this is something of a gag manga? Volume 2 is out in Japan on August 4th: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3872.html It's also on the cover of the next Young Ace (September issue).

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Jul 05, 2015 2:38 pm I've never been able to find scans, anybody else?

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Jul 05, 2015 2:56 pm Is this the one the announced a while back? The one where they are in the videogame industry?
